name: VO2 Max Calculator
tagline_short: Free VO2 max calculator with 17 validated field tests.
tagline_medium: Calculate your VO2 max with 17 peer-reviewed field tests — Cooper, Rockport, Bruce, Norwegian 4x4, and more. Free. No signup. Cooper Institute percentile chart included.
description_long: VO2 Max Calculator is a free, independent reference tool for estimating cardiorespiratory fitness. It implements 17 validated field-test formulas from the exercise-physiology literature (Cooper 12-minute run, 1.5-mile run, Rockport 1-mile walk, Åstrand-Rhyming cycle, Bruce treadmill protocol, beep test, Yo-Yo IR1, and more) and renders results against the full Cooper Institute percentile chart used in ACSM's Guidelines for Exercise Testing and Prescription, 11th edition. The site also publishes a research-grounded blog covering longevity studies, training protocols, and expert summaries (Peter Attia, Andrew Huberman, Andy Galpin, Iñigo San-Millán, Rhonda Patrick) plus a directory of 1,056 lab-based VO2 max testing facilities across all 50 US states.
description_one_paragraph: Free VO2 max calculator with 17 validated field tests, full Cooper Institute percentile chart, training guides, lab-test directory, and a research-grounded blog. No signup. No paywall.

founder.name: Dennis Drenner
founder.bio_short: Maryland-based developer with a biology degree from the University of Maryland. Builder of vo2maxcalculators.com.
founder.bio_long: Dennis Drenner is the founder of Smart Raven AI and the developer behind vo2maxcalculators.com. He holds a biology degree from the University of Maryland, has personally undergone lab-based CPET testing, and has spent years studying the exercise-physiology literature behind VO2 max estimation.
